evidence.evidence_excerpt: ### 1. **Pool Hints** When bonding or calling reward, the client calculates "hints" (previous/next positions in the sorted transcoder pool) to enable O(1) insertions instead of O(n) searches on-chain. [17](#0-16) ### 2. **Batch Operations** Multiple tickets can be created off-chain in batches, with only winning tickets requiring on-chain transactions. ### 3. **Dynamic Gas Pricing**
